.file-embed.background: rgb(11, 15, 19) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgb(11, 15, 19) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

a.external-link[data-tooltip-position=\".background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) url("") no-repeat scroll 100% 4px / 13.2px padding-box border-box

blockquote.background: rgb(13, 16, 20) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.background: rgb(26, 30, 36) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(26, 30, 36) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.callout[data-callout-fold=\"\"][data.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.is-active.is-clickable.nav-file-titl.background: rgb(101, 33, 33) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.is-selected.mod-complex.suggestion-i.background: rgba(212, 47, 47, 0.4) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-active.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(26, 30, 36) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-complex.suggestion-item.background: rgba(212, 47, 47, 0.4) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.multi-select-pill.background: rgb(101, 33, 33) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.prompt.background: rgb(26, 30, 36) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(26, 30, 36) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"search\"].background: rgba(6, 8, 12, 0.376) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

kbd.background: rgb(35, 40, 49) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

li.task-list-item[data-task=\"-\"].background: rgba(62, 69, 82, 0.2) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

li.task-list-item[data-task=\"!\"].background: rgba(194, 42, 42, 0.2) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

li.task-list-item[data-task=\"?\"].background: rgba(253, 175, 0, 0.2) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

li.task-list-item[data-task=\"/\"].background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) linear-gradient(to left, rgb(134, 55, 55) 0%, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) 1%) repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

li.task-list-item[data-task=\">\"].background: rgba(92, 118, 153, 0.2) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

li.task-list-item[data-task=\"b\"].background: rgba(230, 129, 63, 0.2) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

li.task-list-item[data-task=\"c\"].background: rgba(149, 233, 238, 0.2) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

li.task-list-item[data-task=\"d\"].background: rgba(82, 139, 212, 0.2) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

li.task-list-item[data-task=\"f\"].background: rgba(133, 91, 65, 0.2) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

li.task-list-item[data-task=\"i\"].background: rgba(231, 231, 171, 0.2) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

li.task-list-item[data-task=\"I\"].background: rgba(82, 139, 212, 0.2) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

li.task-list-item[data-task=\"p\"].background: rgba(170, 179, 202, 0.2) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

mark.background: rgba(168, 60, 60, 0.4) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: rgb(35, 40, 49) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: rgb(35, 40, 49) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

tbody tr:nth-child(odd).background: rgba(6, 8, 12, 0.376) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

tr.background: rgb(101, 33, 33) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
